quote: I chose sober because I wanted a better life. I stay sober because I got one.
author: Anonymous

quote: You don't have to see the whole staircase. Just take the first step.
author: Martin Luther King

quote: Your best days are ahead of you. The movie starts when the guy gets sober and puts his life back together; it doesn't end there.
author: Bucky Sinister

quote: Being in recovery has given me everything of value that I have in my life. Integrity, honesty, fearlessness, faith, a relationship with God, and most of all gratitude. Sobriety was the best gift I ever gave myself.
author: Rob Lowe

quote: If you do what you've always done, you'll get what you've always gotten.
author: Tony Robbins

quote: I approach sobriety with the same mentality I approached sports with. You're going to put in the time. You've got to suit up, show up, and keep your eyes on the win.
author: Molly Bloom

quote: When I focus on what's good today, I have a good day. When I focus on what's bad, I have a bad day. If I focus on the problem, the problem increases. If I focus on the answer, the answer increases.
author: Alcoholics Anonymous

quote: Rock bottom became the solid foundation on which I rebuilt my life.
author: JK Rowlings

quote: We have all had to learn painful lessons. We are all recovering from some mistake, loss, betrayal, abuse, injustice or misfortune. All of life is a process of recovery that never ends. We each must find ways to accept and move through the pain and to pick ourselves back up. Be patient with yourself.
author: Bryant McGill

quote: Breakthroughs don't get planned, they are prepared for.
author: Goitsemang Mvula

quote: It doesn't matter how slowly you go, only that you do not stop.
author: Confucius

quote: F-E-A-R has two meanings: 'Forget Everything And Run' or 'Face Everything And Rise.' The choice is yours.
author: Zig Ziglar

quote: When I got sober, I thought giving up was saying goodbye to all the fun and all the sparkle, and it turned out to be just the opposite. That's when the sparkle started for me.
author: Mary Karr

quote: Somebody once asked me how I define sobriety and my response was 'liberation from dependence'.
author: Leslie Jamison

quote: Above anything else—above family or job—the main thing is staying sober. That's because without being sober, I don't have a family or a job.
author: William Regal

quote: One day, you'll tell your story of how you overcame what you went through, and it will be someone else's survival guide.
author: Brene Brown

quote: Believe you can, and you're halfway there.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

quote: Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day-in and day-out.
author: Robert Collier

quote: Our greatest glory is not in never falling, but in rising up every time we fail.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Every worthy act is difficult. Ascent is always difficult. Descent is easy and often slippery.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: Don't judge each day by the harvest you reap but by the seeds that you plant.
author: Robert Louis Stevenson

quote: Amazing how we can light tomorrow with today.
author: Elizabeth Barrett Browning

quote: Strength does not come from physical capacity. It comes from an indomitable will.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: Life doesn't get easier or more forgiving. We get stronger and more resilient.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Addiction is just a way of trying to get at something else. Something bigger. Call it transcendence if you want, but it's like a rat in a maze. We all want the same thing. We all have this hole. The thing you want offers relief, but it's a trap.
author: Tess Callahan

quote: Addiction: the disease that makes you too selfish to see the havoc that you created or care about the people whose lives you shattered.
author: Unknown

quote: Sometimes you've just got to give yourself what you wish someone else would give you.
author: Dr. Phil

quote: Hardships often prepare ordinary people for an extraordinary destiny.
author: C.S. Lewis

quote: If you can quit for a day, you can quit for a lifetime.
author: Benjamin Alire Sáenz

quote: The only person you are destined to become is the person you decide to be.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Happiness is where we find it, but rarely where we seek it.
author: J. Petit Senn

quote: The only journey is the one within.
author: Rainer Maria Rilke

quote: Addictions … started out like magical pets, pocket monsters. They did extraordinary tricks, show you things you hadn't seen, and were fun. But came, through some gradual dire alchemy, to make decisions for you. Eventually, they were making your most crucial life decisions. And they were … less intelligent than goldfish.
author: William Gibson

quote: Addiction is the only prison where the locks are on the inside.
author: Unknown

quote: She goes from one addiction to another. All are ways for her to not feel her feelings.
author: Ellen Burstyn

quote: I have come to believe that caring for myself is not self-indulgent. Caring for myself is an act of survival.
author: Audre Lorde

quote: Sometimes the smallest step in the right direction ends of being the biggest step of your life. Tiptoe if you must, but take the step.
author: Naeem Callaway

quote: It always seems impossible until it's done.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: In the midst of winter, I found there was, within me, an invincible summer. And that makes me happy. For it says that no matter how hard the world pushes against me, within me, there's something stronger — something better, pushing right back.
author: Albert Camus

quote: Understanding the difference between healthy striving and perfectionism is critical to laying down the shield and picking up your life.
author: Brené Brown

quote: If we are facing in the right direction, all we have to do is keep walking.
author: Buddhist Proverb

quote: If things go wrong, don't go with them.
author: Roger Babson

quote: No matter how dark the night may get, your light will never burn out.
author: Jeanette LeBlanc

quote: I got sober. I stopped killing myself with alcohol. I began to think: 'Wait a minute. If I can stop doing this, what are the possibilities?' And slowly it dawned on me that it was maybe worth the risk.
author: Craig Ferguson

quote: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
author: Confucius

quote: My recovery must come first so that everything I love in life doesn't have to come last.
author: Unknown

quote: Don't let the past steal your present.
author: Cherríe Moraga

quote: Recovery is an acceptance that your life is in shambles, and you have to change it.
author: Jamie Lee Curtis

quote: One of the hardest things was learning that I was worth recovery.
author: Demi Lovato

quote: Recovery is about progression, not perfection.
author: Unknown

quote: Sometimes, we motivate ourselves by thinking of what we want to become. Sometimes we motivate ourselves by thinking about who we don't ever want to be again.
author: Shane Niemeyer

quote: I think that the power is in the principle. The principle of moving forward, as though you have the confidence to move forward, eventually gives you confidence when you look back and see what you've done.
author: Robert Downey Jr.

quote: I am not defined by my relapses but by my decision to remain in recovery despite them.
author: Unknown

quote: Though no one can go back and make a brand-new start, anyone can start from now and make a brand-new ending.
author: Carl Bard
